response:
If you want **cheaper alternatives to Stitch Fix**, the strongest budget-friendly option in the results is **Nadine West**: it has **no styling fee**, uses an upfront shipping fee that’s credited toward items you keep, and is described as more affordable than Stitch Fix’s lower-priced items.[1][4]

Other alternatives mentioned are **Wantable** and **DAILYLOOK**, but they are not necessarily cheaper overall; Wantable also charges a **$20 styling fee**, and DAILYLOOK’s styling fee starts at **$40**.[2][4]

A quick comparison:

| Service | Upfront fee model | Price note |
|---|---|---|
| **Nadine West** | Shipping fee instead of styling fee | More budget-friendly than Stitch Fix[1][4] |
| **Wantable** | **$20** styling fee | Similar fee to Stitch Fix[2][4] |
| **DAILYLOOK** | **$40** styling fee | More expensive upfront than Stitch Fix[4] |

If your goal is simply to spend less, **Nadine West** is the clearest “cheaper than Stitch Fix” choice in these results.[1][4] If you want, I can also give you the **best Stitch Fix alternatives by category** such as **men, plus size, petites, or maternity**.[3][4]
